title: Windchill: Fundamentals of Engineering Bill of Materials (eBOM)
description: Learn to create, filter, and work with an engineering bill of materials (eBOM). Use the Product Structure Browser to create, edit, and manipulate product structures.

modules.title: Introduction to Windchill eBOM
modules.description: Examine bill of materials concepts, BOM types and management risks, the digital thread, Windchill parts, product structure, and design methodologies.

modules.title: Creating an eBOM
modules.description: Explore four methods for creating an eBOM in Windchill: Product Structure Browser, Auto Associate, Import from Spreadsheet, and Save As.

modules.title: Baselines and Editing an eBOM
modules.description: Create and manage baselines to capture product structure snapshots. Edit an eBOM using the CAD tool, PSB, and spreadsheet methods.

modules.title: Managing an eBOM and BOM Reports
modules.description: Manage object associations, usage attributes, and occurrences. Apply product structure filters and generate BOM reports.
